channel.title: Jacques Jose on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Jacques Jose on LMI

item.title: Isothermal Vapor Pressures of Three Binary Systems: n-Tetradecane plusMethyl Dodecanoate, Methyl Tetradecanoate, or Methyl Hexadecanoatebetween 353.15 and 453.15 K
